{"problem_standardized_math":"Implement Algorithm 7.5 and test it on the extended Rosenbrock function\n\\[\nf(x)=\\sum_{i=1}^{n/2}\\left[\\alpha\\left(x_{2i}-x_{2i-1}^2\\right)^2+(1-x_{2i-1})^2\\right],\n\\]\nwhere \\(\\alpha\\) is a parameter that may be varied, for example \\(\\alpha=1\\) or \\(\\alpha=100\\). The solution is \\(x^*=(1,1,\\ldots,1)^T\\) with \\(f^*=0\\). Use the starting point \\((-1,-1,\\ldots,-1)^T\\), and observe the behavior of your program for various values of the memory parameter \\(m\\)."}
